'''shagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeomanly|yeomanly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeomanly|yeomanly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shagate|shagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shagatesher|shagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagatesherĂ«m|shagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shagatero|shagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagateshĂ«|shagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagateshĂ«m|shagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishagatero|gokishagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagateshĂ«|gokishagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagateshĂ«m|gokishagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshagankerom|goshagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagankeshĂ«|goshagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagankeshĂ«m|goshagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshagankeya|goshagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shagaterom|shagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagatemu|shagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shagateya|shagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishagaterom|gokishagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagatemu|gokishagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishagateya|gokishagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shagagate|shagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shagagatesher|shagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagatesherĂ«m|shagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shagagatero|shagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagagateshĂ«|shagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagateshĂ«m|shagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishagagatero|gokishagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagagateshĂ«|gokishagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagateshĂ«m|gokishagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshagagankerom|goshagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagagankeshĂ«|goshagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagagankeshĂ«m|goshagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshagagankeya|goshagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shagagaterom|shagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagagatemu|shagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shagagateya|shagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishagagaterom|gokishagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagagatemu|gokishagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishagagateya|gokishagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠgĂŠte|shĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠgĂŠtesher|shĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠgĂŠtero|shĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠgĂŠtero|gokishĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠgĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠgĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠgĂŠterom|shĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠgĂŠtemu|shĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠgĂŠteya|shĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠgĂŠterom|gokishĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠgĂŠteya|gokishĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafgafte|shafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafgaftesher|shafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafgaftesherĂ«m|shafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafgaftero|shafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafgafteshĂ«|shafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafgafteshĂ«m|shafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafgaftero|gokishafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafgafteshĂ«|gokishafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafgafteshĂ«m|gokishafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafgafnkerom|goshafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafgafnkeshĂ«|goshafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafgafnkeshĂ«m|goshafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafgafnkeya|goshafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafgafterom|shafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafgaftemu|shafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafgafteya|shafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafgafterom|gokishafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafgaftemu|gokishafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafgafteya|gokishafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
